Any.description: Wildcard class accepting any JSON value. Used for slots like `$vocabulary` (object of strings) and `Configuration.defaultValue` (decimal | string | boolean depending on dataType).
Any.title: Any

Cardinality.description: How many bindings may fill a method input slot. Reduced from {single, multiple, single_or_multiple} on 2026-05-28: `multiple` now means "one or more" (covers the n=1 case), making the third value redundant.
Cardinality.title: Cardinality

Coding.description: A (system, code, display) coding. Used in `codings[]` for supplementary codes (STATO, etc.). Field names follow FHIR Coding convention (code + display, not value + label).
Coding.title: Coding

Configuration.description: A configuration option on a method. Values are supplied by transformations via `methodConfigurations[].value`.

applicable_scopes.description: Optional list of scopes where this configuration applies (e.g. ['universal'], ['per_test']).

conforms_to.description: Optional FK into a controlled vocabulary (e.g. "alpha", "multiplicity_adjustment") for reusable configuration semantics.

dataType.description: Required unless `conforms_to` is set (in which case the dataType is inherited from the vocabulary entry referenced).

defaultValue.description: Default value if not supplied by the transformation. Type matches the parent dataType (decimal, string, boolean, enum value, ...).

name.description: Configuration identifier within the parent method's configurations[]. Referenced from transformation `methodConfigurations[].configurationName`.

Configuration.title: Configuration

ConfigurationDataType.description: Data type of a method configuration value.
ConfigurationDataType.title: ConfigurationDataType

Distribution.description: §3.5.3 — the probabilistic basis of the test statistic.
Distribution.title: Distribution

FHIRValueType.description: Optional value-type constraint on an input measure binding. Mirrors acdc_method.FHIRValueType but listed here so the transformation schema is self-contained at validation time.
FHIRValueType.title: FHIRValueType

Formula.description: §3.4 — the formula contract. The generic_expression's <token> identifiers MUST appear in the parent method's inputs[].name (or outputs[].name for the LHS of a derivation assignment).

generic_expression.description: Pattern showing input slots in angle brackets (e.g. '<response> ~ <covariate>* + <fixed_effect>+').

Formula.title: Formula

FormulaNotation.description: The grammar used by the method's formula. See lib/vocabulary/formula_grammar.json.
FormulaNotation.title: FormulaNotation

InputAttributeBinding.description: Reserved (§6.3 — Attributes). qb:attribute on the input cube.

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

InputAttributeBinding.title: InputAttributeBinding

InputDataStructure.description: §6.3 — DSD for the cube the transformation consumes. dimensions[] and measures[] items may carry `input` FKs; measures[] items may carry `slice`. Output-only fields are rejected.

attributes_.description: qb:attribute components of this DSD. Reserved per §6.3; typically absent.

slices.description: §6.4 — slice templates that pre-filter cubes derived from this DSD.

InputDataStructure.title: InputDataStructure

InputDimensionBinding.description: §6.3 — a dimension on the input cube. input is optional.

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

input.description: §6.3 note 2 — when present, this dim fills a specific method input slot (bound dim). When absent, the dim is pure cube context.

InputDimensionBinding.title: InputDimensionBinding

InputMeasureBinding.description: §6.3 — a measure on the input cube. Carries input; may carry slice.

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

description.description: Free-text note on the binding (e.g. "Baseline value of the endpoint parameter").

requiredValueType.description: §6.3 — optional FHIR value-type constraint on the input measure.

slice.description: §6.4 — name of a Slice in inputDataStructure.slices[] that pre-filters this measure's cube before the method sees it.

InputMeasureBinding.title: InputMeasureBinding

Method.description: Top-level structure of an M_*.json file. Per §3.2, methods carry identity (§3.3), a formula contract (§3.4), input/output slots, and configurations. They never reference clinical or analysis concepts.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Path to the JSON-Schema-Draft-2019-09 file generated from this LinkML.

$vocabulary.description: Map of vocabulary name → file path. Resolver hints for cross-file references (statistics, output_classes, formula_grammar, etc.).

codings.description: §3.3 — supplementary external code system mappings (STATO, third-party). Typically empty until a curator adds them.

conceptId.description: §3.3 — the canonical identifier (e.g. M.ANCOVA). Matches the file basename minus `.json`. The field other ACDC files reference via `usesMethod`.

configurations.description: Method-level configuration options. Per-output configurations were removed during the 2026-05-28 revision.

formula.description: §3.4 — formula declaration. Token names in generic_expression MUST resolve to inputs[].name values.

inputs.description: §3.4 — input slots. Slot names are formula tokens AND transformation-binding FK targets (referenced by `input` on transformation measure/dimension bindings).

label.description: §3.3 — short / acronym form (e.g. "ANCOVA", "MMRM", "LOCF"). Used for compact display and SmartPhrase rendering. May equal `name` for methods without a recognized acronym.

name.description: §3.3 — preferred (written-out) term, SKOS-prefLabel style. E.g. "Analysis of Covariance" for M.ANCOVA, "Last Observation Carried Forward" for M.ImputedValue_LOCF. Distinct from `conceptId` (the machine identifier) and `label` (the short / acronym form).

ncitCode.description: §3.3 — NCI C-code as a flat string (e.g. "C00001_NEW" while placeholder, eventually the assigned C-code). Null when unassigned. Replaces the previous {system, value} Code object.

outputs.description: §3.5/§3.6 — output slots. Slot names are transformation-binding FK targets (referenced by `output` on transformation outputDataStructure.measures[] bindings).

schema_version.description: Version of this LinkML schema the file conforms to.

Method.title: Method

MethodConfigurationOverride.description: A configuration value supplied to the named method's `configurations[].name` slot.

value.description: Configuration value (type matches the configuration's dataType).

MethodConfigurationOverride.title: MethodConfigurationOverride

MethodInput.description: §3.4 — an input slot definition within a Method's inputs[]. `name` is both a formula token and a transformation-binding FK target.

name.description: Slot identifier within inputs[]. Appears in formula.generic_expression as <name> and in transformation bindings via the `input` FK.

MethodInput.title: MethodInput

MethodInputDataType.description: Expected data type of a method input slot.
MethodInputDataType.title: MethodInputDataType

MethodOutput.description: §3.5/§3.6 — an output slot definition within a Method's outputs[]. For analysis methods, `output_type` references an entry in output_class_templates.json (which decomposes into output_class + output_shape + distribution per §3.5). For derivation methods, `value_type` and `unit_policy` give the direct value type (§3.6). Per-output configurations were removed in the 2026-05-28 revision.

examples.description: Optional worked-example entries (free-form). Author / documentation scaffolding; not consumed by validators.

indexed_by.description: For multi-row outputs (e.g. one row per factor level), the input slot names whose levels index the output rows. May include interaction tokens (e.g. "fixed_effect:fixed_effect").

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this output (e.g. "Converted Value" for M.UnitConversion's derived_value).

name.description: Slot identifier within outputs[]. Referenced from transformation outputDataStructure.measures[].output.

output_type.description: FK into lib/vocabulary/output_class_templates.json. Identifies a (class, shape, distribution) tuple per §3.5. Typically used by analysis methods.

sub_types.description: Optional list of named sub-output specializations (e.g. for MMRM's ls_means broken down by group×time vs by group). Free-form; reviewed during the §3.5 vocabulary work.

test_types.description: Optional list of named test specializations (e.g. for CoxPH/MANOVA outputs that aggregate multiple test variants). Free-form; reviewed during the §3.5 vocabulary work.

unit_policy.description: §3.6.1 — per-output unit-handling policy for derivation outputs.

value_type.description: §3.6 — FHIR value type for derivation outputs (e.g. fhir:Quantity).

MethodOutput.title: MethodOutput

OutputAttributeBinding.description: Reserved (§6.3 — Attributes). qb:attribute on the output cube.

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

OutputAttributeBinding.title: OutputAttributeBinding

OutputClass.description: §3.5.1 — the inferential ROLE of an analysis output (the "what is it for"). Vocabulary anchor for output_class_templates.json values.
OutputClass.title: OutputClass

OutputDataStructure.description: §6.3 — DSD for the cube the transformation produces. dimensions[] items list the output cube's qb:dimension components (no input FK on this side per §6.3 note 3). measures[] items carry `output` FKs. slice is rejected on output measures (§6.4).

attributes_.description: qb:attribute components of this DSD. Reserved per §6.3; typically absent.

slices.description: §6.4 — slice templates that pre-filter cubes derived from this DSD.

OutputDataStructure.title: OutputDataStructure

OutputDimensionBinding.description: §6.3 note 3 — a dimension on the output cube. input is rejected here.

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

input.description: §6.3 note 2 — when present, this dim fills a specific method input slot (bound dim). When absent, the dim is pure cube context.

OutputDimensionBinding.title: OutputDimensionBinding

OutputMeasureBinding.description: §6.3 — a measure on the output cube. Carries output; slice is rejected (§6.4).

concept.description: §6.3 — name of a concrete concept in Option_B_Clinical.json (for derivations) or AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (for analyses). Cross-file FK validated at build time.

conceptCategory.description: §6.3 — name of a concept category (e.g. ParameterDimension, VisitDimension). User picks a concrete member at study-spec time.

description.description: Free-text note on the binding (e.g. "Baseline value of the endpoint parameter").

requiredValueType.description: §6.3 — optional FHIR value-type constraint on the input measure.

OutputMeasureBinding.title: OutputMeasureBinding

OutputShape.description: §3.5.2 — the inferential PATTERN (the structure of the result).
OutputShape.title: OutputShape

Slice.description: §6.4 — a named, parameterized slice TEMPLATE. Instantiated to a real qb:Slice at execution time when sliceKey placeholders bind to endpoint values. Lives inside a DSD's slices[] array.

constraints.description: One constraint per fixed dimension. Values may be literal or {placeholder}.

name.description: Slice identifier within slices[]. Referenced by InputMeasureBinding.slice.

Slice.title: Slice

SliceConstraint.description: §6.4 — one fixed dimension within a slice template.

dimension.description: References a dimension name in the parent DSD's dimensions[] (concept or conceptCategory).

value.description: Literal value OR a {placeholder} that resolves via sliceKeys at study-spec time. Recognized placeholders include {parameter}, {visit}, {baseline_visit}, {population}.

SliceConstraint.title: SliceConstraint

SliceKey.description: §6.4 / §6.5 — qb:SliceKey extended with `source` to declare where the fixed-dimension value comes from at study-spec time. Lives at the transformation top level.

source.description: §6.5 — AC/DC extension. Endpoint-spec attribute name supplying the value.

SliceKey.title: SliceKey

SliceKeySource.description: §6.4 — where a slice-key's fixed-dimension value comes from at study-spec time. Currently an informal three-value vocabulary in the existing library (§7 open question: formalize). Listed here as an enum so the validator can warn on unknown values.
SliceKeySource.title: SliceKeySource

inputDataStructure.description: §6.3 — the qb:DataStructureDefinition for the cube this transformation consumes.

methodConfigurations.description: Values for the method's configuration options.

outputDataStructure.description: §6.3 — the qb:DataStructureDefinition for the cube this transformation produces.

sliceKeys.description: §6.4 — declares how slice-template placeholders bind to the endpoint spec at study time.

usesMethod.description: §6.2 — FK to Method.conceptId. Cross-file resolution enforced at build time.

validSmartPhrases.description: SmartPhrase OIDs compatible with this transformation.

TransformationLibrary.description: Top-level container for one or more transformations.

transformations.description: §6.1 — unified array (analyses + derivations merged with a discriminator).

TransformationLibrary.title: TransformationLibrary

TransformationType.description: §6.1 — single transformations[] array with a discriminator.
TransformationType.title: TransformationType

UnitPolicy.description: How a derivation method handles units on its output. Per §3.6.1, this is a per-output property (lives on MethodOutput, not Method).
UnitPolicy.title: UnitPolicy

description: Top-level structure of an M_*.json file. Per §3.2, methods carry identity (§3.3), a formula contract (§3.4), input/output slots, and configurations. They never reference clinical or analysis concepts.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Path to the JSON-Schema-Draft-2019-09 file generated from this LinkML.

$vocabulary.description: Map of vocabulary name → file path. Resolver hints for cross-file references (statistics, output_classes, formula_grammar, etc.).

codings.description: §3.3 — supplementary external code system mappings (STATO, third-party). Typically empty until a curator adds them.

conceptId.description: §3.3 — the canonical identifier (e.g. M.ANCOVA). Matches the file basename minus `.json`. The field other ACDC files reference via `usesMethod`.

configurations.description: Method-level configuration options. Per-output configurations were removed during the 2026-05-28 revision.

formula.description: §3.4 — formula declaration. Token names in generic_expression MUST resolve to inputs[].name values.

inputs.description: §3.4 — input slots. Slot names are formula tokens AND transformation-binding FK targets (referenced by `input` on transformation measure/dimension bindings).

label.description: §3.3 — short / acronym form (e.g. "ANCOVA", "MMRM", "LOCF"). Used for compact display and SmartPhrase rendering. May equal `name` for methods without a recognized acronym.

name.description: §3.3 — preferred (written-out) term, SKOS-prefLabel style. E.g. "Analysis of Covariance" for M.ANCOVA, "Last Observation Carried Forward" for M.ImputedValue_LOCF. Distinct from `conceptId` (the machine identifier) and `label` (the short / acronym form).

ncitCode.description: §3.3 — NCI C-code as a flat string (e.g. "C00001_NEW" while placeholder, eventually the assigned C-code). Null when unassigned. Replaces the previous {system, value} Code object.

outputs.description: §3.5/§3.6 — output slots. Slot names are transformation-binding FK targets (referenced by `output` on transformation outputDataStructure.measures[] bindings).

schema_version.description: Version of this LinkML schema the file conforms to.

title: acdc_transformation
